g.text: Phase 1 — Cocotb sim infra + photon counter
Set up cocotb. Gated TTL counter, 10+ MHz. Verify with function gen as fake APD.
Init / MW gate / laser gate / readout / reference windows. Designed for Ramsey from day one.
Send config, receive spectrum array. Establish readout path before building accumulator.
Store signal + reference counts per freq point. N-shot averaging. Verify readout via UART.
Program 6 registers. Generate target SiC frequency (~1.3 GHz). Verify output with SDR dongle.
All modules integrated in cocotb. Fake APD counts. Plot simulated ODMR contrast vs frequency.
Scope all outputs: laser gate, MW gate, readout window, reference window. Verify timing.
Phase 8 — Real APD + first CW ODMR spectrum
Connect real detector. Observe contrast dip. Fit Lorentzian. Normalize signal / reference.
Two π/2 pulses + free precession. Exploit long T2 at 4 K. Report sensitivity η in T/√Hz.
